title: Requirements, ER Modeling, Functional Dependencies, and Normalization
description: A growing incident system repeats team and member facts, mixes multiple values per cell, and produces update anomalies. Learners cumulatively produce a normalized incident-system schema defense through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Derive entities, attributes, identifiers, relationships, optionality, and business rules from stakeholder language.
Model one-to-one, one-to-many, and many-to-many relationships with minimum and maximum cardinality.
Identify functional dependencies and candidate keys from semantics rather than sample coincidence.
